author: doll-agent
content:
Done. Added 10 f32 sibling tests in ferray-stats/src/reductions/mod.rs:

- sum_f32_basic, sum_f32_large_for_simd (n=4096 — exercises pairwise_sum_f32 kernel)
- mean_f32_basic
- var_f32_basic, var_f32_large_for_simd (exercises simd_sum_sq_diff_f32)
- std_f32_basic
- min_max_f32_basic
- prod_f32_basic
- argmin_argmax_f32_basic
- cumsum_f32_basic

Each test mirrors a previously-f64-only path with realistic tolerances (1e-6 for arithmetic ops, 1e-4 for n=4096 sum, 1e-3 for n=4096 sum-of-squared-differences). The large-N tests are sized above THRESHOLD_COMPUTE_BOUND so they actually exercise the parallel SIMD path added in #173. 266 ferray-stats lib tests pass.
